description: Schema for a specific Artifact with a specific Snyk vulnerability

version.description: The version of Snyk that found the vulnerability, eg 1.1300.2

full_id.description: The full identifier of the vulnerability, eg SNYK-ALPINE321-RUBY-14100871

ignore_expires_exists.description: Whether the vulnerability has an active Snyk ignore entry

ignore_expires.description: The expiry date of the Snyk ignore entry, empty string if none

ignore_expires_ts.description: Unix timestamp of the ignore expiry, 0 if none

first_seen_ts.description: Unix timestamp when this vulnerability was first seen in the repo

trail_name.description: Where this vuln data is attested to
